<!-- Synced from flytohub/flyto-core@df9a861d9e4addbf859ac07d03914d77b820c768 by scripts/sync-core-reference.py; do not edit here. -->

# Packaged Recipe Reference

The package ships **41 executable recipes**. Each row is generated from the YAML asset so parameters, step IDs, and module composition cannot drift from the implementation. Use `flyto recipe &lt;name&gt; --help` for runtime argument rendering.

| Recipe | Purpose | Parameters | Steps | Modules | Source |
|---|---|---|---:|---|---|
| `api-pipeline` | Fetch GitHub user data + recent repos, build a JSON profile report | `username required, output=github-profile.json` | 5 | `http.get, http.get, object.merge, data.json.stringify, file.write` | [`src/recipes/api-pipeline.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/api-pipeline.yaml#L1) |
| `change-detector` | Detect content changes on any webpage. Captures a text snapshot and compares against previous runs using content hashing. Perfect for monitoring competitor pricing pages, legal terms, or government notices. | `url required` | 6 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.snapshot, browser.screenshot, data.dedup, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/change-detector.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/change-detector.yaml#L1) |
| `competitor-intel` | Competitor analysis: pricing data, desktop + mobile screenshots, Web Vitals, structured JSON report | `url required, output=intel-report.json` | 12 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.evaluate, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.performance, browser.evaluate, browser.evaluate, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/competitor-intel.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/competitor-intel.yaml#L1) |
| `csv-to-json` | Convert a CSV file to JSON format | `input required, output=output.json` | 3 | `data.csv.read, data.json.stringify, file.write` | [`src/recipes/csv-to-json.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/csv-to-json.yaml#L1) |
| `demo-scrape` | 30-second web scraping demo — extract structured data with per-step screenshots for trace & replay | `url required, selector=.titleline > a, limit=30, output=demo-scrape-result.json` | 11 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.screenshot, browser.evaluate, browser.evaluate, browser.screenshot, browser.evaluate, browser.evaluate, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/demo-scrape.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/demo-scrape.yaml#L1) |
| `docker-ps` | List running Docker containers | `all=False` | 1 | `docker.ps` | [`src/recipes/docker-ps.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/docker-ps.yaml#L1) |
| `flyto2-public-site-verification` | Evaluate collected DNS, TLS, HTTP route, browser render, and SEO/GEO evidence for flyto2.com. | `base_url=https://flyto2.com, output=public-site-verification.json, markdown_output=public-site-verification.md` | 3 | `warroom.public_site_verify, file.write, file.write` | [`src/recipes/flyto2-public-site-verification.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/flyto2-public-site-verification.yaml#L1) |
| `flyto2-ui-login-smoke` | Reusable Flyto2 UI smoke with runtime login credentials. Credentials are parameters only; do not store them in files. | `login_url required, page_url required, username required, password required, success_indicator=/projects, output=flyto2-ui-login-smoke.json, output_prefix=flyto2-ui-login-smoke, required_text=&#91;&#93;, api_url_pattern=/api/, network_timeout_ms=1500` | 16 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.login, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, browser.console, browser.network, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, browser.screenshot, data.json.stringify, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/flyto2-ui-login-smoke.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/flyto2-ui-login-smoke.yaml#L1) |
| `flyto2-ui-smoke` | Reusable Flyto2 UI smoke for authenticated local/dev pages. Captures DOM integrity, console errors, desktop/mobile screenshots, and overflow signals. | `base_url=http://localhost:5173, path=/footprint, output=flyto2-ui-smoke.json, output_prefix=flyto2-ui-smoke, required_text=&#91;&#93;, api_url_pattern=/api/, network_timeout_ms=1500` | 14 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, browser.console, browser.network, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, browser.screenshot, data.json.stringify, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/flyto2-ui-smoke.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/flyto2-ui-smoke.yaml#L1) |
| `form-fill-review` | Log into a website with runtime credentials, auto-fill a form with your data, then pause for review before submitting. Handles MFA/2FA automatically. Perfect for recurring data entry on sites without APIs. | `login_url required, username required, password required, form_url required, form_data required` | 8 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.login, browser.goto, browser.form, browser.interact, browser.screenshot, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/form-fill-review.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/form-fill-review.yaml#L1) |
| `form-fill` | Auto-fill a web form with data and optionally submit it | `url required, data required, submit=True, output=form-result.png` | 6 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.form, browser.wait, browser.screenshot, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/form-fill.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/form-fill.yaml#L1) |
| `full-audit` | Comprehensive site audit: Web Vitals + SEO + accessibility + console errors + mobile/desktop screenshots + PDF | `url required, output=audit-report.json` | 12 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.performance, browser.evaluate, browser.console, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.pdf, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/full-audit.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/full-audit.yaml#L1) |
| `git-changelog` | Show git diff with file change statistics | `repo=., ref=HEAD` | 1 | `git.diff` | [`src/recipes/git-changelog.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/git-changelog.yaml#L1) |
| `github-issue` | Screenshot a page and create a GitHub issue with the image | `url required, owner required, repo required, title required, token required` | 5 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.screenshot, api.github.create_issue, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/github-issue.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/github-issue.yaml#L1) |
| `http-get` | Fetch data from a URL and save the response | `url required, output=response.json` | 3 | `http.get, data.json.stringify, file.write` | [`src/recipes/http-get.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/http-get.yaml#L1) |
| `image-compress` | Compress an image to reduce file size | `input required, quality=80, output=compressed.jpg` | 1 | `image.compress` | [`src/recipes/image-compress.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/image-compress.yaml#L1) |
| `image-convert` | Convert an image between formats (PNG, JPG, WebP, BMP) | `input required, format required, output=converted` | 1 | `image.convert` | [`src/recipes/image-convert.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/image-convert.yaml#L1) |
| `image-resize` | Resize an image to specified dimensions | `input required, width required, output=resized.png` | 1 | `image.resize` | [`src/recipes/image-resize.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/image-resize.yaml#L1) |
| `json-to-csv` | Convert a JSON array file to CSV format | `input required, output=output.csv` | 1 | `data.json_to_csv` | [`src/recipes/json-to-csv.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/json-to-csv.yaml#L1) |
| `monitor-site` | Check if a website is up and measure response time | `url required, timeout=5000` | 1 | `monitor.http_check` | [`src/recipes/monitor-site.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/monitor-site.yaml#L1) |
| `new-posting-alert` | Monitor any page for new listings (jobs, tenders, announcements). Auto-detects list items, deduplicates across runs, and reports only new entries. Works on government sites, job boards, forums — no API needed. | `url required, min_items=3, dedup_keys=url` | 5 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.detect_list, data.dedup, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/new-posting-alert.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/new-posting-alert.yaml#L1) |
| `ocr` | Extract text from an image using Tesseract OCR | `input required, lang=eng, output=ocr-result.txt` | 2 | `image.ocr, file.write` | [`src/recipes/ocr.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/ocr.yaml#L1) |
| `page-to-pdf` | Render any webpage as a PDF file | `url required, output=page.pdf, size=A4` | 4 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.pdf, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/page-to-pdf.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/page-to-pdf.yaml#L1) |
| `pdf-extract` | Extract text content from a PDF file | `input required, output=extracted.txt` | 2 | `pdf.parse, file.write` | [`src/recipes/pdf-extract.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/pdf-extract.yaml#L1) |
| `port-scan` | Scan open ports on a host | `host required, ports=22,80,443,3000,3306,5432,6379,8080,8443,9090` | 1 | `network.port_scan` | [`src/recipes/port-scan.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/port-scan.yaml#L1) |
| `price-drop-alert` | Track a product page and detect price changes. Extracts the current price, compares against your threshold, and captures a screenshot as evidence. Works on any e-commerce site. | `url required, price_selector, threshold=0` | 5 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.evaluate, browser.screenshot, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/price-drop-alert.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/price-drop-alert.yaml#L1) |
| `responsive-report` | Screenshot a page at 3 breakpoints — mobile (390px), tablet (768px), desktop (1440px) | `url required, prefix=responsive` | 9 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/responsive-report.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/responsive-report.yaml#L1) |
| `scrape-links` | Extract all links from a webpage | `url required, output=links.json` | 5 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.evaluate, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/scrape-links.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/scrape-links.yaml#L1) |
| `scrape-page` | Extract text content from a webpage using a CSS selector | `url required, selector required, output=scraped.json` | 6 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/scrape-page.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/scrape-page.yaml#L1) |
| `scrape-table` | Extract an HTML table from a webpage and save as CSV | `url required, selector=table, output=table.csv` | 6 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/scrape-table.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/scrape-table.yaml#L1) |
| `scrape-to-csv` | Scrape structured data from a webpage and save as CSV | `url required, selector required, fields required, output=scraped.csv` | 6 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/scrape-to-csv.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/scrape-to-csv.yaml#L1) |
| `scrape-to-slack` | Extract data from a webpage and send it to Slack | `url required, selector required, webhook required` | 5 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.evaluate, notification.slack.send_message, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/scrape-to-slack.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/scrape-to-slack.yaml#L1) |
| `screenshot` | Take a screenshot of any webpage | `url required, output=screenshot.png, width=1280, height=720` | 5 | `browser.launch, browser.viewport, browser.goto, browser.screenshot, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/screenshot.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/screenshot.yaml#L1) |
| `site-audit` | SEO + performance audit — meta tags, headings, Web Vitals, screenshot | `url required, output=audit.json` | 7 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.performance, browser.evaluate, browser.screenshot, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/site-audit.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/site-audit.yaml#L1) |
| `social-monitor` | Take a full-page screenshot of any public social media profile and auto-detect recent posts. No login required. Works on Twitter/X, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn public pages. | `url required, output=social-capture.png` | 6 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.scroll, browser.screenshot, browser.detect_list, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/social-monitor.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/social-monitor.yaml#L1) |
| `stock-price` | Fetch current stock price from Yahoo Finance | `symbol required, output=stock.json` | 6 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.evaluate, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/stock-price.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/stock-price.yaml#L1) |
| `visual-snapshot` | Screenshot a page at both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1440x900) sizes | `url required, mobile_output=mobile.png, desktop_output=desktop.png` | 7 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.viewport, browser.screenshot, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/visual-snapshot.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/visual-snapshot.yaml#L1) |
| `warroom-deterministic-audit` | Build deterministic site, intent, state, API and replay evidence without relying on LLM analysis. | `target=http://localhost:5173, output=warroom-evidence.json, markdown_output=warroom-evidence.md, output_prefix=warroom-evidence, network_url_pattern=.*, network_timeout_ms=1500` | 12 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.wait, browser.network, browser.snapshot, browser.screenshot, verification.discover, verification.generate_scenarios, verification.run, verification.report, verification.report, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/warroom-deterministic-audit.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/warroom-deterministic-audit.yaml#L1) |
| `web-perf` | Get Core Web Vitals (LCP, FCP, CLS, TTFB) for any URL | `url required, timeout=5000` | 4 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.performance, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/web-perf.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/web-perf.yaml#L1) |
| `webpage-archive` | Archive a webpage in 3 formats — screenshot, PDF, and HTML snapshot | `url required, prefix=archive` | 7 | `browser.launch, browser.goto, browser.screenshot, browser.pdf, browser.snapshot, file.write, browser.close` | [`src/recipes/webpage-archive.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/webpage-archive.yaml#L1) |
| `whois` | Look up domain registration info — registrar, dates, name servers | `domain required` | 1 | `network.whois` | [`src/recipes/whois.yaml:1`](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-core/blob/main/src/recipes/whois.yaml#L1) |
